title: Insurance Product Management Gets Easier Thanks to Verisk's Mozart Form Composer® Integration with FilingRamp
text: New integration enables Mozart® users to make form filings to regulators in one seamless workflow New integration enables Mozart® users to make form filings to regulators in one seamless workflow

title: Verisk CEO Lee Shavel to Assume Role as President, as Mark Anquillare Steps Down
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., Dec. 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, announced that Mark V. Anquillare is stepping down from Verisk as of January 15, 2023. Anquillare has been serving as president and chief operating officer since May 2022. Chief Executive Officer Lee M. Shavel will assume the role of president, serving concurrent roles as president and CEO.
